text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #84)

I think all issues are fixed.
At least on mine desktops I do not see any crashes in glib and I have almost zero annoying things with fam.

BTW, as far I remember, Vladimir uses (or was use) libinotify as fam backend.
Is is nice option to have.
